name: Tempeh & Sweetcorn Roast with Tahini/Mushroom
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small pan, bring water and soy sauce to a boil. Add the tempeh (defrosted if frozen) and simmer for 10 minutes. Turn the tempeh over and continue simmering for another 10 minutes.
2. Drain the tempeh.
3. Chop the onion and sauté in oil in a saucepan for 3-4 minutes until softened. Remove from heat.
4. Add the drained tempeh to the pan, then add the corn, breadcrumbs, soymilk, thyme, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
5. Transfer the mixture to an oiled oven dish and bake at 350°F (180°C) for about 30 minutes.
6. To make the sauce, chop mushrooms and sauté in oil until tender. Stir in water, tahini, and soy sauce; bring to a boil, then simmer for a couple of minutes.
7. Serve the roast with the sauce poured over it, accompanied by seasonal vegetables.
